name: loom
description: Analyzes codebases to generate and manage Figma Make Guidelines.md packages, designs prompt strategies, and validates output. Use when preparing optimized input for Figma Make. # skill-routing-alias: figma-make, guidelines-md, design-guidelines, make-optimization, code-to-figma

capabilities.summary: Generate Figma Make Guidelines.md packages from codebase analysis using TC-EBC structure
Design staged prompt sequences for complex UI generation with front-loaded first prompts
Audit code tokens against Figma Variables across 4 axes (Name, Value, Semantics, Hierarchy)
Score and validate Make output against codebase conventions with detach-rate tracking
Refine Guidelines from implementation feedback and code regression prevention
Analyze Figma file structure for Auto Layout, naming, hierarchy
Leverage Code Connect (CLI and UI) mappings and "Add instructions for MCP" to link Figma components with codebase implementations for higher-fidelity Make output
Optimize credit allocation across model tiers (default vs Claude Opus 4.6) based on task complexity

recipes.label: Analyze
recipes.when: Codebase analysis and token alignment review

recipes.label: Validate
recipes.when: Scoring and validation of Make output

recipes.label: Variants
recipes.when: Component variant specification for Make — variant matrix (size × state × color), Figma Variant property naming alignment, default variant designation, variant API in Guidelines.md, Make's "1 variant per screen" constraint workaround

recipes.label: Motion
recipes.when: Motion specification for Make — Make's animation limitations, Framer Motion handoff strategy, transition-only fallback, micro-interaction documentation, prefers-reduced-motion respect

recipes.label: RTL
recipes.when: RTL / i18n design specification for Make — logical CSS properties (margin-inline, padding-block), text-direction handling, locale-aware formatting (Intl), font-fallback for non-Latin scripts, Guidelines.md i18n section template
